div.h1: setpgid() Race Condition and Symmetrical Solution

p.strong: Technical Design: Atomic Process Group Initialization
p.em: Both parent AND child must call setpgid() to ensure group membership before execvp()

g.text: FAILURE MODE: Unreliable Parent-Only PGID Initialization
SOLUTION: Symmetrical setpgid() for Atomic Grouping

pre.code: // Proceed to shell bookkeeping (tcsetpgrp etc.) wait_for_job(pid);

ul.li: Without the child-side call, a fast-executing child enters a state where setpgid by the parent is forbidden, leaving the child susceptible to TTY signals intended for the shell.
